one_time_description: Specific Claims settlement - Government of Canada transfer of $60,916,125 includes ~$58,996,700 attributed to Specific Claims segment, including $4,278,000 distributed to minor band members at $93,000 each (46 members)
economic_notes: Nation operates forestry operations through Matsqui First Nation Development Limited Partnership and land development at 2179 McCallum Road through Matsqui Development Limited Partnership. Subsequent to year-end, Nation consolidated two loans totaling $9,520,268 held by Matsqui Development LP under the Nation's name.
notes: Major one-time specific claims settlement drove $60,916,125 in Government of Canada transfers (vs $2,166,872 prior year), with ~$58,996,700 in the Specific Claims segment. Minors Trust Fund grew from $2,622,364 to $7,150,961 due to $4,278,000 specific claims distribution to 46 minor members at $93,000 each. Minors Trust Funds of $7,159,570 classified as liability on balance sheet. Temporary investments of $2,630,570 are entirely held for Minors Trust. Four GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. One consolidated subsidiary (2179 McCallum Nominee Ltd). Subsequent event: $9,520,268 in LP loans consolidated under Nation's name post year-end. No schedule of remuneration disclosed. Other First Nation Governments revenue of $161,431 (Sto:lo Health $153,841 per segment) included in total government transfers calculation.
